description: Use this API to change the value of a character ICON (i.e., an element of the CHRICN array) of an induction machine model at a specified machine. The corresponding integer ICON is set to 0. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = change_immod_chricn(ibus, id, name, j, chdata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_immod_chricn(ibus, id, name, j, chdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Induction machine bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Induction machine identifier. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Icon number to change relative to the start of the block of icons assigned to this model (1 for icon(i), 2 for icon(i+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: chdata
parameters.description: New character icon value. (input; blank by default).

error_codes.description: No model at this induction machine.
model at this machine is aaa not NAME.
no input ICONs used in model NAME.
ICON number outside of the ICON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
